title: Add 12 relay HTTP endpoint tests
reasoning: Added tests for all previously uncovered HTTP endpoints: GET /status, POST /run (503+400), POST /notify (400), GET /status-board (HTML), POST /status-board, POST /chat/feedback, POST /chat/respond (404), GET /chat/logs, GET /nonexistent (404 fallback), suggestion queuing and ordering, and listener grace period behavior.
